mapper.select: SELECT bli.id, bli.booklist_id, bli.book_id, bli.sort_order, bli.created_at, b.title, b.author, b.price, b.publish_date, b.description FROM booklist_item bli LEFT JOIN book b ON bli.book_id = b.id WHERE bli.booklist_id = #{booklistId} ORDER BY bli.sort_order ASC, bli.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booklist_item (booklist_id, book_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{booklistId}, #{bookId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE booklist_item SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM booklist_item WHERE booklist_id = #{booklistId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booklist_item WHERE booklist_id = #{booklistId}
